scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.db:init-local: npm run db:migrate-local && npm run db:seed-local
scripts.db:migrate-local: cd backend && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply xmjl_db --local
scripts.db:seed-local: cd backend && npx wrangler d1 execute xmjl_db --local --file=import.sql
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "api,web" -c "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend -- --ip 0.0.0.0" "npm run dev --prefix frontend -- --host"
